title: zornia nutans
intro: Zornia nutans, also known as the buttonweed, is a flowering plant in the legume family that grows in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Zornia nutans include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
